SleepingSpot.title: Sleeping spot
SleepingSpot.description: An uncomfortable rescue or sleeping spot for one humanoid.

SleepingBag.title: Sleeping bag
SleepingBag.description: An uncomfortable place for one humanoid to sleep.

SingleBed.title: Single bed
SingleBed.description: A comfortable place for one humanoid to sleep.

DoubleBed.title: Double bed
DoubleBed.description: A comfortable place for two humanoids to sleep.

HospitalBed.title: Single Hospital bed
HospitalBed.description: A comfortable place for one humanoid to rest and recover.

CryoPod.title: Cryo pod
CryoPod.description: Freezes creatures in time, preventing ageing for as long as this item has power.

SmallTable.title: Small table
SmallTable.description: A small table that is a relatively comfortable place for a humanoid to eat. At least it's better than eating off the floor.

MediumTable.title: Medium table
MediumTable.description: A table that is a relatively comfortable place for a humanoid to eat. At least it's better than eating off the floor.

LargeTable.title: Large table
LargeTable.description: A large table that is a relatively comfortable place for a humanoid to eat. At least it's better than eating off the floor.

Chair.title: Chair
Chair.description: A relatively comfortable place for a humanoid to sit.

Stool.title: Stool
Stool.description: Marginally better than sitting on the floor.

CaptainsChair.title: Captains chair
CaptainsChair.description: A chair suitable for a Captain.

CommandChair.title: Command chair
CommandChair.description: A chair mostly used on the bridge.

FloorLight.title: Floor light
FloorLight.description: A light that fits into the floor.

AlarmFloorLight.title: Alarm floor light
AlarmFloorLight.description: A light that fits into the floor.
